name: Varys Thornspire
sd_appearance: A towering dragonborn figure, their silver-scaled frame glinting with faint iridescent hues along the spine, their jagged scar etching a crimson line from cheek to jaw, eyes sharp and pale gold beneath a hood of tattered, soot-streaked leather, fingers curled around a weathered crossbow with glowing runes pulsing at the stock, chainmail links tarnished by centuries of contracts, tail twitching restlessly like a nervous predator, a jagged shard of obsidian embedded in their boot heel where a rift once erupted.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
